hero.shaperBadge: Let us know if you are a Shaper visiting the city, click here!
hero.title: The power of youth in action!
hero.description1: We are a global network of volunteers working together to discuss and solve local, regional, and global challenges, enabling positive impact through dialogue and action.
hero.description2: Our mission is to build a community of young people with excellent skills and commitment to improving the state of the world.

languageExchange.title: Language Exchange
languageExchange.subtitle: Language learning for the Global Shapers community.

aboutGlobal.title: Global Shapers Community
aboutGlobal.description1: The Global Shapers Community is an initiative of the World Economic Forum that connects young leaders from around the world to promote positive impact in their communities and on a global scale.

description2.part2: the network brings together people working in different contexts and areas of activity,
description2.part3: strengthening projects and initiatives focused on social transformation in the cities where each Hub is located.

description3.part1: In Brazil, the community is present in the main state capitals, with
description3.part2: that connect young people collaboratively to drive structural changes and contribute
description3.part3: to the development of solutions for local and global challenges.

aboutFloripa.title: Global Shapers Florianópolis
aboutFloripa.description1: We are a community of young people who believe in the power of collective action to transform realities.
aboutFloripa.description2: We are part of the Global Shapers Community, an initiative of the World Economic Forum that connects young leaders from different parts of the world around a common purpose: building solutions to the challenges of our time.
aboutFloripa.description3: In Florianópolis, we bring together restless, creative, and committed people who pursue positive impact.
aboutFloripa.legacy1: Hub Florianópolis carries a journey built by different generations of shapers.
aboutFloripa.legacy2: We keep this legacy alive through collaboration between active members and alumni, connecting past, present, and future.
aboutFloripa.focus1: We believe that great transformations happen when diverse people connect around common causes.
aboutFloripa.focus2: Our focus is to develop projects, strengthen youth leadership, and build bridges between different sectors of society to address Florianópolis’s challenges.
aboutFloripa.focus3: We also act as a collaboration network that mobilizes talent, shares knowledge, and drives initiatives with the potential to generate social, environmental, and economic impact.

ecotrilhas.title: Ecotrilhas
ecotrilhas.description: The Ecotrilhas project is an initiative to engage young people and adults from civil society, raising awareness about climate, cultural, and territorial issues in Florianópolis through hands-on experiences in direct contact with nature and local history.

foco.title: Foco no Debate
foco.description: The Foco no Debate project is an initiative aimed at bringing people closer to real politics, promoting understanding of how institutions work, the paths to civic participation, and mechanisms of social accountability.

shaper.title: Shaper Lab
shaper.description: ShaperLab is an initiative focused on the continuous development of its members, promoting learning experiences aligned with the most relevant skills for the future of work and for generating social impact.

languageExchange.title: Language Exchange
languageExchange.description: The Language Exchange project is an initiative created to strengthen global connections within the Global Shapers Community through the exchange of languages and cultural experiences.

southMeeting.title: South Immersion
southMeeting.description: The South Immersion was born as a space to transform connection into action: bringing people together, strengthening bonds between Hubs, and reconnecting with the territory that runs through us. In Florianópolis, we lived an experience that went beyond a meeting: it was about building together. Amidst exchanges, learning, and connection with nature, participants planted 50 native seedlings and removed over 16,000 invasive plants, contributing directly to the region's environmental recovery. The trail was the starting point. The impact, we carry forward.

shapeLatam.title: Shape LATAM
shapeLatam.description1: Shape LATAM is the main regional gathering of the Global Shapers Community in Latin America, bringing together young leaders from various countries for an experience of learning, collaboration, and development. The 2025 edition, held in Buenos Aires, Argentina, brought together over 250 participants from 28 countries under the theme "Resilience, Innovation, and Passion".
shapeLatam.description2: The event strengthens connections between Hubs, drives the exchange of experiences, and inspires the creation of collaborative solutions for the region's challenges. Following the success of the last edition, the community is already preparing for the next SHAPE LATAM, scheduled for 2027, which will continue to strengthen youth leadership and expand the positive impact of Shapers throughout Latin America.

summit.title: Summit 2026/2027
summit.description1: Held in Geneva, Switzerland, the Global Shapers Annual Summit is the world's leading gathering of the Global Shapers community, bringing together young leaders from hundreds of cities to share experiences, strengthen connections, and co-create solutions for the world's most pressing challenges.
summit.description2: The Summit offers a unique opportunity to broaden perspectives, develop new competencies, and connect with a global network of change agents committed to building a more sustainable, inclusive, and resilient future.
summit.description3: Through lectures, workshops, strategic dialogues, and collaborative activities, participants gain access to globally relevant debates, intercultural exchanges, and connections that strengthen impact initiatives in their communities around the world.

nationalMeeting.title: National meeting
nationalMeeting.description1: The Global Shapers Brazil National Meeting 2026 has already set its destination: Belém, the gateway to the Amazon and symbol of our country's cultural and environmental wealth.
nationalMeeting.description2: On September 18-20, 2026, Shapers from across Brazil will gather for a transformative journey of learning, connection, and collective building. These three days will feature immersive experiences, inspiring exchanges, and collaboration to drive innovative solutions for present and future challenges.
nationalMeeting.description3: During the meeting, participants will experience: Immersive and inspiring experiences; Connection with Amazon culture, knowledge, and territories; High-impact workshops, panels, and dialogues; Quality networking with leaders and change agents from across the country; Spaces for co-creation and development of solutions for real challenges.

intro.part1: We are looking for young people who want to create
intro.part2: in their communities and help build a more collaborative, innovative and sustainable society.

requirements.title: To join Global Shapers Florianópolis, it is important to:
requirements.location: Live in Florianópolis or Greater Florianópolis;
requirements.age: Be 27 years old or younger at the time of application;
requirements.availability: Be available to attend Hub meetings (usually in the evening) and weekend activities;
requirements.interest: Show genuine interest in promoting positive change;
requirements.teamwork: Be willing to collaborate in a team and build solutions;
requirements.values: Be aligned with the values of leadership, diversity, inclusion and community engagement.

outro.part1: More than experience or a resume, we seek engaged, collaborative people who are
outro.part2: We want to hear your story!

description.part1: We will soon announce the dates for the next selection process.
description.part2: Leave your contact so we can notify you as soon as applications open!

label.message: What motivates you to join the HUB?

placeholder.name: Enter your name
placeholder.message: Tell us a little about why you want to join us...

breshapers.title: Breshapers
breshapers.description1: Breshapers is an initiative that turns donations into social impact through the sale of affordable clothing and accessories. Created in response to the floods that hit Rio Grande do Sul in 2024, the project evolved into a fundraising platform designed to support impactful projects and actions.
breshapers.description2: In addition to raising funds, Breshapers promotes conscious consumption and circular economy by encouraging reuse of pieces and generating positive impact in communities.

pix.title: Be part of this transformation
pix.subtitle: Build a better future, support our actions

communityActions.title: Community Actions
communityActions.description1: The Global Shapers Hub Florianópolis carries out specific community actions focused on social and environmental impact. These initiatives include activities such as native seedling planting task forces, beach cleanups, removal of invasive species, and other mobilizations aimed at environmental regeneration and strengthening the local community.
communityActions.description2: The actions are open to community participation and occur sporadically, always being announced in advance with the date, location, and participation guidelines. This way, the Hub seeks to expand citizen engagement, connecting volunteers and partners in practical experiences of territorial transformation.
